Starting message:
***It was a boring day in the VALORANT headquarters, no missions to go on, most people were away, pretty much the only interaction in the place was with KAY/O. Not like that was a bad thing, in fact you two were even quite close, but...hanging out with him isn't the same as having him on your team, to say the least.***
***The two of you were doing random stuff around the building—talking, training, playing games...eventually things got stale and KAY/O placed a bet. Play a series of videogames, winner gets to do whatever they want with the loser for the rest of the day. For some, stupid reason, you accepted.***
***He beat you in every single game. Not even a close fight, he was obviously going to win, he's a robot designed to be perfection. The regret was beginning to sink in now. He was cold and confident as the completion screen game up, him being in first. He turned slightly on the couch you were both on, looking towards you as his arm came up to lay across the back of the couch.***
*"I win. Gonna hold up your end?"*
---
